title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind's Gemini 3 Flash Preview audio API provides speaker identification by name, timestamps, emotion tags, language detection with translation, and summaries through a single API call. This unified audio understanding layer supports downstream applications including speech generation and real-time multimodal processing.
writeup: Thor Schaeff of Google DeepMind walks through Gemini 3 Flash Preview's audio API, which returns speaker identification by name, timestamps, emotion tags, language detection with translation, and summaries from a single API call. The significance lies in consolidating these capabilities into one unified audio understanding layer rather than stitching together separate tools. That layer also feeds downstream applications including speech generation and real-time multimodal processing.
